emails.subject: DealBench LLC
emails.body: Attached covers several issues; Bob Baird and I hope to catch up with you on exchange-related and EOL considerations. I'll give you a call. Thanks, NJD Nora J. Dobin Senior Counsel Enron Global Finance Enron Corp. 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 713/345-7723 (phone) 713/853-9252 (fax) E-mail: nora.dobin@enron.com Forwarded by Nora Dobin/Corp/Enron on 11/10/2000 11:18 AM Nora Dobin 11/01/2000 08:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: DealBench LLC
emails.body: Re: DealBench LLC I'm going to be hard to get next week Monday Tuesday I'll be in NYC (speaking at a conference), Wed. a.m. in the office and the rest of the week at the management conference. If it works for you, any time the following week (20, 21 or 22) would be better for me. If it is urgent, let me know and I will try to break from my meetings during the day on Mon., Tues. afternoon or maybe Wed. (but since that's the only time I'll be in the office all week it's already pretty full). Just let me know my assistant (Taffy x57373) can set something up on my calendar if you have a time you want to reserve.
